headline: Friday is your test—movement over snacking, discipline over comfort
summary: You're losing at 0.04 kg/week but need 0.62; today, Friday's your decision point to prove emotional eating won't sabotage your 88 kg goal.
details: Eat only portioned Huel meals and whole plant foods today—no processed snacks, no emotional grazing. Get on the rowing machine for 30 minutes; your sedentary work demands this movement cost. This single Friday's discipline closes your pace gap; this is where you prove you're serious about 2027-06-08.
